name: Crypto Staking Calculator
description: Calculate your potential cryptocurrency staking rewards and compounding interest over time.

fields.label: Initial Token Amount
fields.helpText: The amount of cryptocurrency you are staking

fields.label: Current Token Price ($)
fields.helpText: The current fiat value of one token

fields.label: Annual Percentage Yield (APY %)
fields.helpText: The annual interest rate including compounding

fields.label: Staking Duration (Months)
fields.helpText: How long you plan to stake your tokens

fields.label: Final Token Balance
fields.helpText: Total number of tokens after staking duration

fields.label: Final Fiat Value ($)
fields.helpText: Total fiat value (assuming token price remains constant)

explanation:
## How does Crypto Staking work?

Staking cryptocurrency is similar to putting money in a high-yield savings account. By locking your tokens in a Proof-of-Stake (PoS) network, you help secure the blockchain and earn rewards in the form of additional tokens.

### Annual Percentage Yield (APY)
APY represents the real rate of return earned on a savings deposit or investment taking into account the effect of compounding interest.

**Note:** This calculator assumes the token price remains constant. In reality, cryptocurrency prices are highly volatile.
derivation:
## Formula

To calculate the final token amount without complex daily compounding, a simple interest projection over the specific months is often used for base estimates:

$$\text{Final Tokens} = \text{Initial} \times \left(1 + \text{APY} \times \frac{\text{Months}}{12}\right)$$
